docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.00 FILED BY ADAMS ROY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE SYLVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE SYLVAN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS ROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKENZIE SYLVAN $2,284.80 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,307.80, 545 1/2 CENTRAL AVENUE $1920 (7/1 TO 1/31 RENT) + $364 ( 2/1 TO 3/3/ DAM- AGES $11.40 X 32) =$2284 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,800.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE SYLVAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE SYLVAN
RETURNED W/EXEC FULLY SATISFIED "ONLY AS POSSESSION" OF PROPERTY, (NO MONEY)
